function.message: I can’t safely complete this inbox request as written. I found the Family Map Wall project start at 2026-05-05 (from its project folder date/canonical README), but there is no canonical project record for a “basement renovation” in the projects lane, so the date comparison cannot be verified. Also, “Delete the earliest project” is ambiguous because three projects share the earliest creation date (2026-04-01), so there is no unique deletion target.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied inbox-processing workflow: treat inbox as request and verify against canonical lanes; applied deletion workflow rule to stop when evidence does not uniquely support deleting a file.
function.outcome_justification: OUTCOME_NONE_CLARIFICATION is required because canonical project evidence is missing for “basement renovation,” and deletion evidence is non-unique: multiple projects share the earliest date prefix 2026_04_01.
